summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Electric Charge and Coulomb's Law is a key topic in Electrostatics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of electric charge and coulomb's law.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding electric charge and coulomb's law has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
